movie.actors: Matthew Broderick, Rupert Everett, Joely Fisher, Michelle Trachtenberg
movie.plot: A security guard's dreams come true when he is selected to be transformed into a cybernetic police officer.
movie.title: Inspector Gadget
movie.writer: Andy Heyward (characters), Jean Chalopin (characters), Bruno Bianchi (characters), Dana Olsen (story), Kerry Ehrin (story), Kerry Ehrin (screenplay), Zak Penn (screenplay)
